def until(self, method: Callable[[D], Union[Literal[False], T]], message: str = "") -> T: """Wait until the method returns a value that is not False.
Calls the method provided with the driver as an argument until the return value does not evaluate to ``False``.
Parameters: ----------- method: callable(WebDriver) - A callable object that takes a WebDriver instance as an argument.
message: str - Optional message for :exc:`TimeoutException`
Return: ------- object: T - The result of the last call to `method`
Raises: ------- TimeoutException - If 'method' does not return a truthy value within the WebDriverWait object's timeout
Example: -------- >>> from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By >>> from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait >>> from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
# Wait until an element is visible on the page >>> wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10) >>> element = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "exampleId"))) >>> print(element.text) """ screen = None stacktrace = None
end_time = time.monotonic() + self._timeout while True: try: value = method(self._driver) if value: return value except self._ignored_exceptions as exc: screen = getattr(exc, "screen", None) stacktrace = getattr(exc, "stacktrace", None) if time.monotonic() > end_time: break time.sleep(self._poll) > raise TimeoutException(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.TimeoutException: Message: E Stacktrace: E Symbols not available. end_time = 61702145.86435115 message = '' method = <function visibility_of_element_located.<locals>._predicate at 0x7fe591f9fa60> screen = None self = <selenium.webdriver.support.wait.WebDriverWait (session="9d55c55a540e886601c1ca8909d85136")> stacktrace = ['Symbols not available. self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_premium.TestEviteRSVPPremium object at 0x7fe592a039e0> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fe5923350a0>
def test_evite_rsvp_premium(self, config): _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"]
rsvp_modal = config.pages["rsvp_modal"] event_details = config.pages["event_details"] who_is_coming = config.pages["who_is_coming"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_event_details = config.pages["step2_event_details"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(_test_name) psql_db = PostgreSQL(_test_name)
# Logger logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(_test_name) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
# Create Invitation evite_gallery_page = evite_home_page.select_nav("create_invitation") evite_gallery_page.select_filter_by(["premium"])
# Pick up a random template from the template page evite_gallery_page.select_random_template(premium=True)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(test_name=_test_name) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time(premium=True) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}" )
# Step 1: Card Editor step1_template.fill_text_editors(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="details")
# Step 2: Enter Details page step2_event_details.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="gifting") step1_template.select_next(url="preview")
step1_template.select_next(url="guests") > step5_guests.add_guests(test_data=self._json_test_data["guests"])
_test_name = 'test_evite_rsvp_premium' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fe5923350a0> event_details = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_event_details_module.EventDetailsModule object at 0x7fe5923362d0> evite_gallery_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_gallery_page.EviteGalleryPage object at 0x7fe59238a6c0> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7fe592336a50> host = 'automation test' logger = <Logger test_evite_rsvp_premium (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7fe592335a30> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7fe592334680> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7fe592334e00> psql_db = <lib.postgre_sql.PostgreSQL object at 0x7fe5923369f0> quake_v3_event = <commons.pages.quake_v3.quake_v3_event.QuakeV3Event object at 0x7fe592b52540> rsvp_modal = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_rsvp_modal.RSVPModal object at 0x7fe5923360f0> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_premium.TestEviteRSVPPremium object at 0x7fe592a039e0> step1_template = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7fe592334560> step2_event_details = <commons.pages.evite.step2_event_details.Step2EventDetails object at 0x7fe592336300> step5_guests = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7fe592336d50> step6_review_send = <commons.pages.evite.step6_review_send.Step6ReviewSend object at 0x7fe5923358e0> user_email_addr = 'evite-02122026-172252-42-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' who_is_coming = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_whos_coming_module.WhosComingModule object at 0x7fe592334530>

def wait_for(self, locator, timeout=None): """ Waits for an element to be visible using the passed in locator.
:param locator: Locator tuple for the element :param timeout: (Int) Number of seconds to wait for an element :return: WebElement if it is visible """ timeout = timeout or settings.DEFAULT_TIMEOUT

testcase.name: test_evite_rsvp_free

failure.message: selenium.common.exceptions.ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element <button data-qa-id="login" data-impression-tracking="" data-qa-tigran="" data-testid="" data-clipboard-text="" class="button assets-js-common-components-MegaNav-MegaNavVariant-components-GlobalNav-components-Login-Login-module__loginButton__w1mLl unstyled-button small" type="button" title="" aria-label="" tabindex="0">...</button> is not clickable at point (1831, 10). Other element would receive the click: <label class="aa-Label" aria-label="Submit" for="autocomplete-3-input" id="autocomplete-3-label">...</label> (Session info: chrome=144.0.7559.96); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: Symbols not available. Dumping unresolved backtrace: 0x7e7d13 0x7e7d54 0x60b290 0x65bde8 0x659ff9 0x6579b2 0x656bc4 0x64b308 0x677fbc 0x64ad44 0x678184 0x695111 0x677d56 0x6494d9 0x64a294 0xa5bb64 0xa57215 0xa73fad 0x801ef8 0x809b0d 0x7f0738 0x7f0902 0x7da1da 0x77065d49 0x7799cebb 0x7799ce41

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_free.TestEviteRSVPFree object at 0x7fdcadafcd40> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fdcad4b0e60>
def test_evite_rsvp_free(self, config): """ New Creation Flow with Fabric Templates
Create Event, RSVP guests, Yes, No. Email and/or Phone.
Verify guest in Guest List Verify RSVP in Manage Invitation Dashboard
:param config: :return: """
_test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(inspect.stack()[0][3]) psql_db = PostgreSQL(inspect.stack()[0][3])
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"]
rsvp_modal = config.pages["rsvp_modal"] event_details = config.pages["event_details"] who_is_coming = config.pages["who_is_coming"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_event_details = config.pages["step2_event_details"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
# Create Invitation evite_gallery_page = evite_home_page.select_nav(action="create_invitation") evite_gallery_page.select_filter_by(actions=["free"]) evite_event_page = evite_gallery_page.select_random_template()
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(inspect.stack()[0][3]) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time()
if host: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = host else: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}" )
# Step 1: Card Editor step1_template.fill_text_editors(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="details")
# Step 2: Enter Details page step2_event_details.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="gifting") step1_template.select_next(url="preview") step1_template.select_next(url="send") evite_event_page.skip_ads()
config.pages["evite_event_confirmation"].select_confirmation_button(action="add_guests") step5_guests.add_guests(test_data=self._json_test_data["guests"]) step1_template.select_next(url="confirm")
event_id = Utils.get_event_id_from_url(config.driver.current_url)
# Get Event Details get_event_data = quake_v3_event.get_event_information( user_email_addr=user_email_addr, user_pass=user_pass, event_id=event_id )
login_modal.sign_out()
guest_list = step5_guests.initialize_guest_list( test_data=self._json_test_data["guests"], get_event_data=get_event_data["guests"] )
# RSVP for each guest for guest in guest_list:
if ( guest["guest_type"] == "host" or guest["test_data"]["rsvp"] == "undecided" or not guest["test_data"]["rsvp"] ): continue
logger.info("Going guest view URL") page.get_url( environment=config.environment, sub_page_url=f"/event/{get_event_data['event']['id']}?gid={guest['guest_id']}", add_cookie=False, )
# Check if guest have to be registered if guest["test_data"]["registered"]: # Change register data self._json_test_data["register"]["first_name"] = guest["test_data"]["name"] self._json_test_data["register"]["email"] = guest["test_data"]["email_addr"] # Register > login_modal.register(test_data=self._json_test_data["register"], existing_user=True)
_test_name = 'test_evite_rsvp_free' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fdcad4b0e60> event_details = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_event_details_module.EventDetailsModule object at 0x7fdcad4b0170> event_id = '02C1IIAE4SKDAAU6MEPRBB5MHOJNWI' evite_event_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_event_page.EviteEventPage object at 0x7fdcad4b0830> evite_gallery_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_gallery_page.EviteGalleryPage object at 0x7fdcad4fce60> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7fdcad4b0920> get_event_data = {'current_user_rsvp': {'address': None, 'avatar_url': None, 'checked_in': True, 'comments': None, ...}, 'event': {'ama...ium_assets/fabric_gallery_asset/1770081135/composed_thumbnail_5490124460949504_default_800x600.webp', ...}}, ...}, ...} guest = {'avatar_url': None, 'checked_in': False, 'comments': None, 'date_created': '2026-02-13T01:26:06', ...} guest_list = [{'avatar_url': None, 'checked_in': True, 'comments': None, 'date_created': '2026-02-13T01:24:39', ...}, {'avatar_url'...:26:06', ...}, {'avatar_url': None, 'checked_in': False, 'comments': None, 'date_created': '2026-02-13T01:26:06', ...}] host = 'automation test' logger = <Logger test_evite_rsvp_free (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7fdcad4b0800> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7fdcad4b0e00> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7fdcad4b0620> psql_db = <lib.postgre_sql.PostgreSQL object at 0x7fdcca9b8080> quake_v3_event = <commons.pages.quake_v3.quake_v3_event.QuakeV3Event object at 0x7fdcaf10c3b0> rsvp_modal = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_rsvp_modal.RSVPModal object at 0x7fdcad4b0b30> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_free.TestEviteRSVPFree object at 0x7fdcadafcd40> step1_template = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7fdcad4b24b0> step2_event_details = <commons.pages.evite.step2_event_details.Step2EventDetails object at 0x7fdcad4b00b0> step5_guests = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7fdcad4b0c50> user_email_addr = 'evite-02122026-172351-36-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' who_is_coming = = False existing_user = True self = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7fdcad4b0800> test_data = {'country': 'United States', 'email': 'evite-guest-25796551-z-test@evitetest.com', (session="d14072918164e91ddea92e888cd679c1")> _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <selenium.webdriver.remote.errorhandler.ErrorHandler object at 0x7fdcada30110> response = {'status': 400, 'value': '{"value":{"error":"element click intercepted","message":"element click intercepted: Element ...x801ef8\\n\\t0x809b0d\\n\\t0x7f0738\\n\\t0x7f0902\\n\\t0x7da1da\\n\\t0x77065d49\\n\\t0x7799cebb\\n\\t0x7799ce41\\n"}}'}
def check_response(self, response: dict[str, Any]) -> None: """Checks that a JSON response from the WebDriver does not have an error.
:Args: - response - The JSON response from the WebDriver server as a dictionary object.
:Raises: If the response contains an error message. """ status = response.get("status", None) if not status or status == ErrorCode.SUCCESS: return value = None message = response.get("message", "") screen: str = response.get("screen", "") stacktrace = None if isinstance(status, int): value_json = response.get("value", None) if value_json and isinstance(value_json, str): try: value = json.loads(value_json) if isinstance(value, dict): if len(value) == 1: value = value["value"] status = value.get("error", None) if not status: status = value.get("status", ErrorCode.UNKNOWN_ERROR) message = value.get("value") or value.get("message") if not isinstance(message, str): value = message message = message.get("message") else: message = value.get("message", None) except ValueError: pass
exception_class: type[WebDriverException] e = ErrorCode() error_codes = [item for item in dir(e) if not item.startswith("__")] for error_code in error_codes: error_info = getattr(ErrorCode, error_code) if isinstance(error_info, list) and status in error_info: exception_class = getattr(ExceptionMapping, error_code, WebDriverException) break else: exception_class = WebDriverException
if not value: value = response["value"] if isinstance(value, str): raise exception_class(value) if message == "" and "message" in value: message = value["message"]
screen = None # type: ignore[assignment] if "screen" in value: screen = value["screen"]
stacktrace = None st_value = value.get("stackTrace") or value.get("stacktrace") if st_value: if isinstance(st_value, str): stacktrace = st_value.split("\n") else: stacktrace = [] try: for frame in st_value: line = frame.get("lineNumber", "") file = frame.get("fileName", "<anonymous>") if line: file = f"{file}:{line}" meth = frame.get("methodName", "<anonymous>") if "className" in frame: meth = f"{frame['className']}.{meth}" msg = " at %s (%s)" msg = msg % (meth, file) stacktrace.append(msg) except TypeError: pass if exception_class == UnexpectedAlertPresentException: alert_text = None if "data" in value: alert_text = value["data"].get("text") elif "alert" in value: alert_text = value["alert"].get("text") raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace, alert_text) # type: ignore[call-arg] # mypy is not smart enough here > raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element <button data-qa-id="login" data-impression-tracking="" data-qa-tigran="" data-testid="" data-clipboard-text="" class="button assets-js-common-components-MegaNav-MegaNavVariant-components-GlobalNav-components-Login-Login-module__loginButton__w1mLl unstyled-button small" type="button" title="" aria-label="" tabindex="0">...</button> is not clickable at point (1831, 10). Other element would receive the click: <label class="aa-Label" aria-label="Submit" for="autocomplete-3-input" id="autocomplete-3-label">...</label> E (Session info: chrome=144.0.7559.96); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception E Stacktrace: E Symbols not available.
